description: Easy PDF Server is a service for converting HTML or web pages into PDF files. It offers a hosted REST API and also advertises a self-hosted AWS Marketplace option.
summary: EasyPDFServer exposes one authenticated REST API for HTML/URL-to-PDF conversion, documented by an OpenAPI spec at `https://www.easypdfserver.com/openapi.yaml` with base URL `https://api.easypdfserver.com`.
